name: WFBE_NEURODEF_AAPOS_HEAVY_EAST
notes: AA BATTERY / SAM SITE (HEAVY, 4 AI) — EAST. Battery layout mirrors the WEST SAM site with RU/TK kit: two ZU-23 auto-cannons on the flanks (heavy bullet AA + anti-ground) and a centre Igla, all on a wide 18 m dispersed arc (+Y) so no single pass or counter-battery salvo kills the battery. Each gun in its own pit; earthen ramparts between them eat near-miss shrapnel without capping elevation. Camo-netted control/radar point centre-rear cues the guns. Rear DShK is the local security over the blind side. Split ammo left/right. HBarrier flank screens, forward wire, open covered rear entrance.

objs.role: ZU-23 (far left) — arc NW, wide dispersion
ZU-23 (far right) — arc NE, wide dispersion
control/radar point — battery command, dispersed rear
camo net over the control point
local security DShK — covers rear/left blind side
forward wire — closes the centre approach
